snippet.description:
Domm Official Teser || দম || Afran Nisho || Puja Cherry || Choncol Chowdhury || Redwan Rony ||

দম || DHOM OFFICIAL TREASER || AFRAN NISHO || PUJA CHERRY || CHONCOL CHOWDHURY || EID UL FITIR 2026

"দম" দিয়ে নির্মানে ফিরছেন রেদওয়ান রনি। দুই বাংলার তিন সফল প্রযোজনা প্রতিষ্ঠান এসভিএফ,চরকি ও আলফা-আই স্টুডিও লিঃ একসাথে সিনেমা হলে নিয়ে আসছে এই প্রতিক্ষিত চলচ্চিত্র। আপেক্ষায় থাকুন!

#Chorki​ #dommFullMovie #newbanglanatok2026 #newnatok2026  #Domm​ #redoanrony​
#dhom #domm #dum #দম #দম_ট্রেলার #dhomAfranNisho #dhomTreailar #DhomTreasure #DhommovieUpdate #afrannisho #shakibkhan #tandob #trending #movie #lage_ura_dhura #dhomTreasureReview #tandav #dhaam #dhaamtreailar
----------------------------
❯ In this channel I'm creating Mashup / Fan-made / Concept trailer videos, involve collecting multiple pieces of film footage from one or multiple movies and editing them to create a new trailer. Trailer mashups are often created for a movie that does not exist now or to change the genre of an existing film. These are derivative works and as such, may find protection from copyright claims under the doctrine of fair use. The trailer mashups are not only a user-generated form of digital creativity but a way to create anticipation for future releases, working in tandem with current movie trailers. Movie trailers are designed to give minimal plot detail and to create hype and anticipation. Fan-made trailer mashups allow the audience to perform their own cinematic spin on current movie footage. This allows the trailer to focus on a specific actor or portion of the film. It could even change the plot or genre of the film entirely.

We Follow All Youtube Term's

snippet.title: Love Sitter | Official Trailer | Ziaul Hoque Polash | Sadia Ayman | Eid Special Bangla WEB Film 2026
snippet.description:
Bongo presents the Eid Special Bangla WEB Film 2026 – Love Sitter | লাভ সিটার, starring Ziaul Hoque Polash & Sadia Ayman in the lead roles. Directed by Amitabh Reza Chowdhury & Mushficaa Maasud, this Bongo Original brings you a unique blend of love, laughter, and unexpected twists. Watch the official trailer now!

শহরভর্তি কোলাহলের মাঝে, এক শান্ত ভালোবাসার খোঁজে... ভালোবাসার ভাষা যখন শব্দ ছাড়িয়ে অনুভবে মিশে যায়, তখনই শুরু হয় এক মায়ার গল্প। 
অমিতাভ রেজা চৌধুরী ও মুশফিকা মাসুদের যৌথ পরিচালনায় আসছে অন্যরকম এক সম্পর্কের গল্প— 'Love Sitter' - আসছে এই ঈদে (৩য় দিন), শুধুমাত্র Bongo-তে! ভিজিট: https://tu.bongobd.com/Watch-LiveTv-Movie-Drama

A lonely man’s quiet life changes when he unexpectedly becomes the caretaker of a mischievous cat. Through this unusual responsibility, he forms a heartfelt connection with the cat’s owner, leading to a promise that changes both their lives forever.

একজন নিঃসঙ্গ মানুষের জীবন বদলে যায় যখন হঠাৎ করেই সে একটি দুষ্টু বিড়ালের দেখাশোনার দায়িত্ব পায়। সেই সূত্রে বিড়ালের মালিকের সাথে গড়ে ওঠে এক আবেগঘন সম্পর্ক, যা তাদের জীবনে এনে দেয় এক আজীবনের প্রতিশ্রুতি।

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go

عننا لسه بدري 

 ياه ع الوجــع

يا سهم وجه قطم ضهري 
راهنتي يا دنيا علي كسري

مفيش اصلاً وجع بعده

وايام حلوه يتعدوا 


غصب عني مش مجمع

The teaser trailer of the upcoming Bangla movie Rakkhosh (রাক্ষস) starring Siam Ahmed is finally here, and it looks intense, dark, and mysterious. In this video, I share my first reaction and honest review of the teaser, analyzing the visuals, tone, background score, and what it might reveal about the story.

From the teaser, Rakkhosh appears to explore a darker side of storytelling with thriller or horror elements. Siam Ahmed seems to be portraying a complex and intense character, which could become one of the most talked-about roles in his career.

First reaction to the Rakkhosh teaser trailer

Teaser breakdown and hidden details

Siam Ahmed’s character and performance vibe

Cinematography, background music & tone analysis

Expectations from the full movie
